name: crucible
description: Design-for-failure feature pipeline. One session orchestrates an isolated-context subagent team (manager = the session, plus senior / reviewer / tester subagents) through a spec-first RED→GREEN→review→QA→validate→PR sequence. Reviewer and tester see only the diff + spec/acceptance criteria — never the implementer's reasoning — so review is unbiased. Gated mode (pauses at the spec gate, human merges) or leader mode (bounded autonomy to PR). Single feature or sprint batch. Repo-agnostic: discovers test/lint/typecheck/build commands from the repo (or crucible.config.json) and follows the repo's own conventions.
